name: rss-reader
description: Fetch and summarize RSS/Atom feeds. Let your Kin stay up to date with news, blogs, and podcasts.
author: KinBot Team

defaultFeeds.label: Default Feed URLs
defaultFeeds.description: Comma-separated list of RSS/Atom feed URLs to use when no URL is specified

maxItems.label: Default Max Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of items to return per feed
